headline: FreightWaves Today: Mergers, fraud rings and the mid-June rate pause
summary: FreightWaves Today discussed mergers, massive fraud rings and the mid-June rate pause among other logistics topics during Monday’s live show. The post FreightWaves Today: Mergers, fraud rings and the mid-June rate pause appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: House endorses 25-year old rules for rail merger review
summary: Opponents of a controversial transcontinental rail merger hailed the House transportation appropriations committee’s backing of a ‘rigorous’ review of the deal by federal regulators. The post House endorses 25-year old rules for rail merger review appeared first on FreightWaves.
